title: Will any U.S. House member visit Iran before Jul 1, 2026?

current.lean_note: I lean NO (my prob 2%) but it isn't +EV at the ask — no value bet (betting the other side would contradict my forecast).
current.rationale_summary: No sitting US House member has visited Iran in the modern era; with an active conflict, a Level 4 advisory, and no planned CODEL, a visit before July 1 is virtually impossible (marginally above Rubio as an informal trip is less institutionally constrained).
reference_classes: 0 known sitting House-member visits to Iran
